name: acp-orchestrator
description: ACP Agent Orchestrator - Web UI for managing Copilot CLI agents across repositories

scripts.install:all: cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others --names server,client --prefix-colors blue,green "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.build: npm run install:all && cd client && npm run build
scripts.test: cd server && npm test && cd ../client && npm test
